message:
🐛 Fix Security Issues and GPU Status showing empty state while loading (#806)

Both cards showed their "no issues" / "no data" empty state before data
finished loading, because the empty check didn't gate on isLoading.
Add !isLoading guard so the skeleton shows until data actually arrives.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
